Description.Name: Food production specalist
Description.Details: You became a commander after years as an [[DM.BaseDescriptionDefs[Pafftek_Lore_Farmer],On orbit Hydroponics Farmer]]. Your time on orbit was lonly with no one else assigned to your station.  You are glad to have walked away from that life.

OptionDescription: You became a commander after years as an Orbital Farmer.
Intro: You became a commander after years as an orbital Hydroponics Farmer
BioDescription: You became a commander after years as a Farmer in an orbital Hydroponics Farm.  It was months without speaking to anyone else except yourself and a few days of talking to transport pilots.  You are glad to be rid of that lifestyle.
